# AspectRatio

Constrains its child to a specific width-to-height ratio.

## Import

```jsx
import { AspectRatio } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| ratio | `number \| ResponsiveValue<number>` | `4/3` | The aspect ratio (width/height) |
| children | `ReactNode` | - | Single child element |

## Usage

```jsx
<AspectRatio ratio={16 / 9} maxW="400px">
  <Image src="photo.jpg" alt="Photo" objectFit="cover" />
</AspectRatio>

<AspectRatio ratio={{ base: 1, md: 16 / 9 }}>
  <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/..." allowFullScreen />
</AspectRatio>
```

## Features

- Supports responsive ratio values
- Works with images, videos, maps, and iframes
- Child element fills the container completely
